items.title: Computer vision training
items.description: Teams log train/loss and val/accuracy every epoch, pick checkpoints by val/accuracy, and record test/mAP once before deploying an object detector.

items.title: Credit scoring models
items.description: Gradient-boosted tabular models log val/auc across depth trials; the champion run stores test/auc in a release registry with a single final_report entry.

items.title: NLP fine-tuning
items.description: Fine-tunes log train/loss every 100 steps and val/perplexity each epoch; scalar curves guide learning-rate schedules before a one-shot test/perplexity on a held-out benchmark.

items.title: Recommendation systems
items.description: Rankers track val/ndcg during architecture search while train/loss reflects the pairwise objective— selection uses val/ndcg, not train/loss alone.

items.title: Hyperparameter sweeps
items.description: Twenty learning-rate runs each emit identical val/loss curves keyed by epoch so the experiment tracker overlays them for comparison.

items.title: Regulatory ML sign-off
items.description: Validation metrics support model development documentation; a locked test/rmse is logged once with audit metadata for compliance review.
